subcodes.first_line: O Friends of God! Now is the time for joy and gladness, for acquiring the characteristics of the All-Merciful. This transitory world is passing
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی وقت فرح و شادمانیست و هنگام اکتساب اخلاق رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
